title: Remove gh-pages branch
author: farosch
body_snippet:
Was moved to its own project by @benwa.
I cannot delete the branch as it is protected.

iterations.description: Removing a gh-pages branch is a repository maintenance task outside the scope of code changes in this fork and not relevant to mRemoteNG application functionality.
Repass confirmed: Upstream repo admin task (delete gh-pages branch), not a code change

notes:
AI triage (claude): Removing a gh-pages branch is a repository maintenance task outside the scope of code changes in this fork and not relevant to mRemoteNG application functionality.
Approach: Close as wontfix — branch management is handled directly via GitHub repository settings, not via code commits
